title: Tamil Nadu government formation news Live Updates: Congress leaders congratulate Vijay amid alliance buzz
description: Tamil Nadu government formation news Live Updates: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam has won 108 seats, short of majority in Tamil Nadu. Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam got 73, All India Anna Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam 53. Focus now is on alliances as government formation begins.
